verification: Queried all 3 articles via articles(query: "blog_id:89331695869 AND (handle:...)") immediately after create. All show isPublished=true, correct author, summary, tags, plus titleTag + descTag metafields with the intended SEO values.
indexing_notes: Next-day Vercel cache will pick them up automatically once the storefront Storefront API revalidate fires. Force a refresh by hitting /api/revalidate if needed.
Sitemap.xml regenerates on each request (next.js dynamic sitemap), so new articles appear in the next crawl.

Internal-link strategy: each article links 3-11 times into existing PLPs (/collections/tempur-pedic-mattresses, /collections/stearns-foster-mattresses, /collections/diamond-mattresses, etc.) and the 5 showroom location pages (/pages/koreatown-best-mattress-store, etc.). This boosts those internal pages' link equity in addition to ranking the new article URLs.
followup_for_user: Submit the 3 new URLs to Google Search Console (URL Inspection → Request Indexing) to accelerate first crawl. Optional but recommended — without manual submission Google typically discovers blog articles within 2-7 days via sitemap.
